overall.description: Gameplay footage from a wizarding school game showing a student character in robes walking through a grand gothic castle interior, ascending an ornate wooden staircase, traversing upper corridors, and entering a Charms classroom filled with other students at desks.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with circular floor pattern

agents.ego_description: walking across the polished entrance hall floor toward the grand wooden staircase

notable_agents.action: student standing near the base of the staircase

entered.detail: large ornate wooden staircase with carved railings ascending to upper floors
intricate geometric stone inlay in the marble floor
lit wall-mounted lanterns with warm glow
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a grand gothic entrance hall with a circular stone floor pattern, facing a large wooden staircase. Wall sconces and framed paintings adorn the stone walls as the character walks forward toward the stairs.

events.description: character turns at the staircase landing to continue ascending

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase, passing other students on the landings

notable_agents.action: student descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: tall narrow window with stone tracery letting in daylight
ornately carved wooden balustrades along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand wooden staircase with ornate railings, passing wall sconces and approaching a tall gothic window on the landing. Another student descends the stairs as the character turns to continue upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with statues and chandeliers

events.description: approaching the large wooden door to the Charms classroom

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor toward the classroom entrance

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead toward the classroom door

entered.detail: large stone statue of a robed figure holding a sphere on a pedestal
large dark wooden door with metal studs and diamond patterns

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character walks along a corridor with wooden paneling, passing a large stone statue on the right. The character approaches a heavy wooden door at the end of the hall where another student walks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Charms classroom with student desks and chandeliers

events.description: character opens the wooden door and enters the Charms classroom
character stops walking and looks around the classroom interior

agents.ego_description: entering the classroom and walking between rows of desks toward the front

notable_agents.action: student sitting at desk reading a book
student sitting at desk facing the front of the room

entered.detail: ornate hanging chandeliers with multiple candles illuminating the room
rows of wooden desks and benches with students seated
large arched windows with diamond-patterned panes letting in daylight

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Charms classroom through the heavy wooden door, revealing a spacious room with high ceilings, ornate chandeliers, and rows of wooden desks where students sit studying. Large arched windows line the walls as the character walks between the desks toward the front of the classroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand gothic entrance hall into a bustling academic classroom. It begins on a circular stone floor, moving past wall sconces and framed paintings toward a massive wooden staircase. As the character ascends the ornate stairs and passes a tall gothic window on the landing, the environment shifts from the open hall to a more intimate upper corridor lined with wooden paneling and a large stone statue. The scene then progresses toward a heavy wooden door at the end of the hall, which opens to reveal a spacious Charms classroom illuminated by ornate chandeliers and large arched windows. Finally, the camera glides through the room, weaving between rows of wooden desks where students sit studying.
